title: Update pre-order button to open Instagram DM directly

requirements.text: Update the 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram' button in ProductCard.tsx to link directly to the Instagram DM conversation for anime_vibe_pk using the URL https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk instead of the profile page, so tapping the button instantly opens the DM chat.

quotes: Make it so when Dm Me To Order it instantly takes you to dm

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the pre-order button on any product card opens https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk in a new tab
The button label remains 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram' or equivalent
The link opens Instagram DM directly rather than the profile page

constraints: Do not change the button label or visual styling
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing any other navigation or link behavior on the site
Adding new product fields or backend changes
